title: neanotis hirsuta var. glabra
intro: Neanotis hirsuta var. glabra, also known as the hairy neanotis or glabrous hairy neanotis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Neanotis hirsuta var. glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
